mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(disk_utilization)::numeric, 2), 0) as disk_usage, COALESCE(SUM(reads), 0) as iops_read, COALESCE(SUM(writes), 0) as iops_write FROM disk_io_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

SELECT date_trunc('hour', collected_at) as time_bucket, backend_type, COALESCE(SUM(reads + writes), 0) as total_io FROM disk_io_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', collected_at), backend_type ORDER BY time_bucket, backend_type

SELECT date_trunc('hour', collected_at) as time_bucket, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(queue_depth)::numeric, 2), 0) as avg_queue_depth FROM disk_io_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', collected_at) ORDER BY time_bucket

SELECT date_trunc('hour', collected_at) as time_bucket, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(read_latency_ms)::numeric, 2), 0) as avg_read_latency, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(write_latency_ms)::numeric, 2), 0) as avg_write_latency FROM disk_io_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', collected_at) ORDER BY time_bucket

SELECT date_trunc('hour', collected_at) as time_bucket, COALESCE(SUM(reads + writes), 0) as total_iops, COALESCE(ROUND((SUM(blks_read + blks_written) * 8.0 / 1024.0)::numeric, 2), 0) as throughput_mb FROM disk_io_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', collected_at) ORDER BY time_bucket

SELECT date_trunc('hour', collected_at) as time_bucket, COALESCE(SUM(evictions), 0) as eviction_rate FROM disk_io_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', collected_at) ORDER BY time_bucket

SELECT date_trunc('hour', collected_at) as time_bucket, COALESCE(SUM(wal_bytes), 0) as wal_bytes FROM disk_io_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', collected_at) ORDER BY time_bucket

WITH recent_data AS ( SELECT queue_depth, (reads + writes) as total_iops, (read_latency_ms + write_latency_ms) / 2.0 as avg_latency, wal_bytes, evictions FROM disk_io_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ) SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(queue_depth)::numeric, 2), 0) as disk_queue_length, COALESCE(ROUND((AVG(total_iops) / 10000.0 * 100)::numeric, 2), 0) as iops_saturation, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(avg_latency)::numeric, 2), 0) as avg_latency, COALESCE(ROUND((AVG(wal_bytes) / 1000000.0)::numeric, 2), 0) as wal_bottleneck, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(evictions)::numeric, 2), 0) as buffer_eviction_rate FROM recent_data

WITH aggregated_data AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY collected_at DESC, backend_type) as id, backend_type, collected_at, COALESCE(SUM(reads + writes), 0) as total_io, COALESCE(SUM(reads), 0) as read_rate, COALESCE(SUM(writes), 0) as write_rate, COALESCE(ROUND((SUM(blks_read) * 8.0 / 1024.0)::numeric, 2), 0) as read_mbs, COALESCE(ROUND((SUM(blks_written) * 8.0 / 1024.0)::numeric, 2), 0) as write_mbs, COALESCE(ROUND((SUM(blks_read + blks_written) * 8.0 / 1024.0)::numeric, 2), 0) as throughput_mbs, COALESCE(SUM(fsyncs), 0) as fsync_rate, COALESCE(SUM(evictions), 0) as eviction_rate, COALESCE(SUM(extend_count), 0) as extend_rate, COALESCE(ROUND(((1.0 - (SUM(blks_read)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(blks_read + blks_written), 0))) * 100)::numeric, 2), 0) as hit_ratio, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(queue_depth)::numeric, 2), 0) as avg_queue_depth, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG((read_latency_ms + write_latency_ms) / 2.0)::numeric, 2), 0) as avg_latency, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(read_percent)::numeric, 2), 0) as read_percent, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(write_percent)::numeric, 2), 0) as write_percent, CASE WHEN AVG((read_latency_ms + write_latency_ms) / 2.0) > 50 THEN '위험' WHEN AVG((read_latency_ms + write_latency_ms) / 2.0) > 20 THEN '주의' ELSE '정상' END as status FROM disk_io_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY backend_type, collected_at ) SELECT * FROM aggregated_data
AND status IN
#{status}
ORDER BY collected_at DESC, backend_type LIMIT 1000
